get.description:
Retrieve aggregated incident data with support for grouping and filtering.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

schema.title: Incident query filter
schema.description: Filter configuration for incidents

endTime.description: Filters all incidents that were open in the given timeframe end time (deprecated, use incident_open_range instead)

isMuted.description: Indicates if the incident is muted

metaLabels.description: Filters all incidents with the given meta labels

startTime.description: Filters all incidents that were open in the given timeframe start time (deprecated, use incident_open_range instead)

schema.description: Group by fields for aggregation

contextualLabel.description: The contextual label to group by.

schema.title: Pagination request
schema.description: Pagination parameters for list requests

pageSize.description: Number of items to return per page

pageToken.description: Token for the next page of results

get.description:
List incident events with support for filtering, pagination, and ordering.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

schema.title: Incident event query filter
schema.description: Filter configuration for incident events

contextualLabels.description: The contextual labels of the incident

displayLabels.description: The display labels of the incident

isMuted.description: Indicates if the incident is muted

schema.title: Pagination request
schema.description: Pagination parameters for list requests

pageSize.description: Number of items to return per page

pageToken.description: Token for the next page of results

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Order by fields for incident events

schema.title: List incident events order by request

get.summary: Get total count of incident events
get.description:
Retrieve the total count of incident events matching a filter.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

schema.title: Incident event query filter
schema.description: Filter configuration for incident events

contextualLabels.description: The contextual labels of the incident

displayLabels.description: The display labels of the incident

isMuted.description: Indicates if the incident is muted

get.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a single incident by related alert event id.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: Event ID associated to the Incident to acknowledge

schema.description: Event ID associated to the Incident to acknowledge

post.description:
Mark incident as acknowledged by event id.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:acknowledge`

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: Event ID associated to the Incident to acknowledge

schema.description: Event ID associated to the Incident to acknowledge

post.description:
Mark incident as resolved by event id.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:close`

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: Event ID associated to the Incident to resolve

schema.description: Event ID associated to the Incident to resolve

post.description:
Returns filter values for incidents based on the provided criteria.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

schema.title: Get filter values request
schema.description: Request to get available filter values for incidents

get.summary: Get available incident event filter values
get.description:
Returns available filter values for incident events.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

schema.title: Incident event query filter
schema.description: Filter configuration for incident events

contextualLabels.description: The contextual labels of the incident

displayLabels.description: The display labels of the incident

isMuted.description: Indicates if the incident is muted

get.description:
Retrieve multiple incidents by their IDs in a single request.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

schema.description: The ids.

post.description:
Lists all available incidents based on specified filters and order. The list is ordered in an unspecified direction and sorted by creation time.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

schema.title: List incidents request
schema.description: Request to list incidents with filtering, pagination and ordering options

post.description:
Mark one or more incidents as acknowledged.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:acknowledge`

schema.title: Acknowledge incidents request
schema.description: Request to acknowledge one or more incidents

incidentIds.description: List of incident IDs to acknowledge

items.description: List of incident IDs to acknowledge

post.description:
Assign one or more incidents to a specific user.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:assign`

schema.title: Assign incidents request
schema.description: Request to assign one or more incidents to a user

incidentIds.description: List of incident IDs to assign

items.description: List of incident IDs to assign

delete.description:
Remove user assignments from one or more incidents.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:assign`

parameters.name: incident_ids
parameters.description: List of incident IDs to unassign

schema.description: List of incident IDs to unassign

items.description: List of incident IDs to unassign

post.description:
Closes all incidents matching the given criteria.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:close`

schema.title: Close incidents request
schema.description: Request to close one or more incidents

incidentIds.description: List of incident IDs to close

items.description: List of incident IDs to close

post.description:
Mark one or more incidents as resolved.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:close`

schema.title: Resolve incidents request
schema.description: Request to resolve one or more incidents

incidentIds.description: List of incident IDs to resolve

items.description: List of incident IDs to resolve

get.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a single incident by its unique identifier.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

schema.description: Unique identifier.

get.description:
Retrieve a chronological list of all events associated with a specific incident. Includes state changes, assignments, acknowledgments, and resolutions.

Requires the following permissions:
- `incidents:read`

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: ID of the incident to retrieve events for

schema.description: ID of the incident to retrieve events for
